allow: Bash(find . -name "dev.db" 2>&1 | head; ls -la c/ 2>&1 | head; find /c 2>&1 | head -5)
PowerShell(Set-Location salon-pos; $env:DATABASE_URL="file:$\(Get-Location\)\\dev.db"; npx prisma db push; npx prisma generate)

PowerShell(npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss --url "file:$\(\(Get-Location\).Path\)\\dev.db" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10 | Out-String; npx prisma generate 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3 | Out-String)

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\dudek\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\POS\\salon-pos"; npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss --url "file:$\(\(Get-Location\).Path\)\\dev.db" 2>&1 | Out-String)

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('./dev.db'\);const rows=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT status, COUNT\(*\) as cnt, COUNT\(receiptNumber\) as withNum, MIN\(receiptNumber\) as minNum FROM \\\\\\"Order\\\\\\" WHERE status='PAID' GROUP BY status\\"\).all\(\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows,null,2\)\);db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('./dev.db'\);const rows=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) cnt, COUNT\(completedAt\) withCompleted, COUNT\(receiptNumber\) withNum, COUNT\(receiptType\) withType FROM \\\\\\"Order\\\\\\" WHERE status='PAID'\\"\).all\(\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows,null,2\)\);db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv/config'\);const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\(process.env.DATABASE_URL.replace\('file:',''\)\);const cats=db.prepare\('SELECT id,name FROM ServiceCategory ORDER BY name'\).all\(\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cats,null,2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv/config'\);const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\(process.env.DATABASE_URL.replace\('file:',''\)\);try{db.exec\(\\`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ServiceGroup \(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, sortOrder INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0\);\\`\);const cols=db.prepare\(\\"PRAGMA table_info\('ServiceCategory'\)\\"\).all\(\);if\(!cols.find\(c=>c.name==='groupId'\)\){db.exec\(\\`ALTER TABLE ServiceCategory ADD COLUMN groupId TEXT REFERENCES ServiceGroup\(id\);\\`\);console.log\('Added groupId column'\);}else{console.log\('groupId column already exists'\);}console.log\('ServiceGroup table ready'\);}catch\(e\){console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv/config'\);const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\(process.env.DATABASE_URL.replace\('file:',''\)\);const m=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT * FROM _prisma_migrations WHERE migration_name=?\\"\).get\('20260525000000_add_service_groups'\);if\(!m\){db.prepare\(\\"INSERT INTO _prisma_migrations \(id,checksum,migration_name,started_at,finished_at,applied_steps_count\) VALUES \(?,?,?,datetime\('now'\),datetime\('now'\),1\)\\"\).run\('manual-'+Date.now\(\),'manual','20260525000000_add_service_groups'\);console.log\('Migration recorded as applied'\)}else{console.log\('Migration already recorded'\)}")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv/config'\);const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\(process.env.DATABASE_URL.replace\('file:',''\)\);const rows=db.prepare\('SELECT key,length\(value\) as len FROM SystemConfig ORDER BY key'\).all\(\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows,null,2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('prisma/dev.db', { readonly: true }\); console.log\('--- ServiceGroup table ---'\); try { console.log\(db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='ServiceGroup'\\"\).all\(\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('ERR:', e.message\); } console.log\('--- ServiceCategory columns ---'\); try { console.log\(db.prepare\(\\"PRAGMA table_info\('ServiceCategory'\)\\"\).all\(\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('ERR:', e.message\); } console.log\('--- migrations ---'\); try { console.log\(db.prepare\(\\"SELECT migration_name, finished_at FROM _prisma_migrations ORDER BY finished_at DESC LIMIT 8\\"\).all\(\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('ERR:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('prisma/dev.db', { readonly: true }\); const tables = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\\"\).all\(\); console.log\('Tables in dev.db:'\); tables.forEach\(t => console.log\('  ' + t.name\)\);")

Bash(node -e 'const c = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new c.PrismaClient\(\); console.log\('\\''serviceGroup exists:'\\'', typeof p.serviceGroup\); console.log\('\\''serviceCategory exists:'\\'', typeof p.serviceCategory\); p.$disconnect\(\);')

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('@prisma/client'\); console.log\('Available models on prototype:'\); const proto = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(c.PrismaClient.prototype || {}\); console.log\(proto.filter\(n => !n.startsWith\('_'\) && !n.startsWith\('$'\)\).slice\(0, 40\).join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./dev.db', { readonly: true }\); for \(const t of ['Service','ServiceCategory','ServiceGroup','User','Product','RetailProduct','Customer','Order']\) { try { const c = db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM \\"'+t+'\\"'\).get\(\); console.log\(t.padEnd\(20\), c.n\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(t.padEnd\(20\), 'ERR', e.message\); } }")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); const db = new Database\('./dev.db', { readonly: true }\); const dbRow = db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM \\"Branch\\" WHERE id=\\"main\\"'\).get\(\); const snap = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('prisma/shared-catalog.json','utf8'\)\); const snapRow = snap.branches.find\(b => b.id === 'main'\); console.log\('DB row:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(dbRow, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Snapshot row:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(snapRow, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); const db = new Database\('./dev.db', { readonly: true }\); const dbRow = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT * FROM 'Branch' WHERE id='main'\\"\).get\(\); const snap = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('prisma/shared-catalog.json','utf8'\)\); const snapRow = snap.branches.find\(b => b.id === 'main'\); console.log\('DB row:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(dbRow, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Snapshot row:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(snapRow, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); const db = new Database\('./dev.db', { readonly: true }\); const dbRow = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT * FROM 'Product' WHERE id='cmp9zrxrq000k7ovdqwlb2xuc'\\"\).get\(\); const snap = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('prisma/shared-catalog.json','utf8'\)\); const snapRow = snap.products.find\(p => p.id === 'cmp9zrxrq000k7ovdqwlb2xuc'\); console.log\('DB row:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(dbRow, null, 2\)\); console.log\('---Snap row:---'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(snapRow, null, 2\)\);")
